en: Small Health Potion
A simple remedy brewed from common herbs. Restores a small amount of health.
Medium Health Potion
A well-made tonic used by travellers and soldiers alike. Restores a decent amount of health.
Large Health Potion
A potent restorative rarely found outside an Alchemist's stock. Restores a large amount of health.
Small Mana Potion
Restores a small amount of mana.
Medium Mana Potion
Restores a medium amount of mana.
Large Mana Potion
Restores a large amount of mana.
Wood
Timber from the trees around Ashvale. Solid and useful, the town is sure to need a lot of it.
Stone
Stone from rocks around Ashvale. Useful for crafting and building.
Adamantite
An exceptionally hard ore. Difficult to work with, but the results are worth it.
Coal
Burns long and hot. Useful for smelting or keeping a forge alive.
Copper
A common ore with a warm, reddish hue. A reliable starting point for new tools.
Diamond
Harder than anything else found in these areas. It rarely surfaces, be sure not to waste it.
Gold
Valuable ore useful for upgrading tools. More durable than iron or copper.
Iron
The middle tier of ore used for upgrading tools. It is strong, yet easily workable.
Mithril
A mystical ore with unusual lightness. It is said to hold an enchantment longer than ordinary metal.
Silver
Cool to the touch and slow to tarnish. Prized by craftspeople and wary travellers both.
Tin
A soft, pliable ore often used in decoration crafting.
Rusty Key
Well worn and spotted with rust. It looks like it opens something important.
Basic Axe
A study wood-cutting axe. It's seen some use, but the edge still holds. Simply approach a tree and press the use tool button.
Basic Pickaxe
Built for breaking stone and ore. Heavy, reliable, and not subtle about it. Simply approach some ore and press the use tool button.
Basic Sword
A straightforward blade. It won't win any prizes, but it'll do the job.
Green Slime Cube
Gelatinous and faintly luminous. An alchemist would find a use for this.
Stone
Rough-cut stone pulled from the ground. Ashvale was built on it once, and will be again.
Iron Ingot
Smelted from iron ore. The most common metal in Ashvale, and a reliable starting point.
Copper Ingot
Smelted from copper ore. Warmer and harder to come by than iron.
Silver Ingot
Smelted from silver ore. Cool to the touch, even after the forge. Not easy to find.
Gold Ingot
Smelted from gold ore. Used for the best of tools.
Iron Sword
A solid starter blade. Forged from iron and built to last.
Iron Pickaxe
A dependable pickaxe. Gets through most stone and ore without complaint.
Iron Axe
A straightforward iron axe. Heavy enough to fell most trees in a few swings.
Copper Sword
A step up from iron. The edge holds longer and the balance is noticeably better.
Copper Pickaxe
Harder and sharper than iron. Opens up veins the starter pickaxe struggles with.
Copper Axe
Cuts cleaner than iron and lasts longer. Worth the extra effort to forge.
Silver Sword
A finely crafted blade. Harder to make, but the edge holds far longer than copper.
Silver Pickaxe
Precise and durable. Gets through anything copper and iron struggle with.
Silver Axe
Light for its strength. A skilled woodcutter's preferred tool.
Gold Sword
A sturdy blade forged to fight monsters.
Gold Axe
A lightweight axe for chopping down any tree.
Gold Pickaxe
A lightweight pickaxe perfect for those tougher ores.
Herb
A handful of foraged herbs, dried and bundled. Smells earthy.
Empty Vial
A small glass vial, clean and stoppered. Ready to hold something useful.
Small Chest
A small, study wooden chest for storing your belongings. You can access your entire storage from any chest.
Crafting Table
A sturdy table for crafting potions and other useful items, including furniture.
